message:
fix(packs/package_managers): close safe-pattern bypass on install/list/show in pkg names

All read-only safe subcommands (install/i/ci, add/install, list/ls/info/view,
audit, show, freeze, search) used trailing `\b`. A package name that
starts with or contains the safe keyword would short-circuit destructive
pip uninstall / cargo yank / apt remove / brew uninstall ops:

  pip uninstall install-helper      -> matched pip-list (contains "show"
                                        if package metadata displayed)
  apt remove list-dirs-pkg          -> matched apt-list safe
  brew uninstall show-my-info-tool  -> matched pip-list safe (show)

Changed trailing `\b` to `(?=\s|$)` on all 11 package-manager safe
subcommands.

files.patch:
@@ -32,27 +32,27 @@ pub fn create_pack() -> Pack {
 fn create_safe_patterns() -> Vec<SafePattern> {
     vec![
         // npm/yarn/pnpm install are generally safe
-        safe_pattern!("npm-install", r"npm\b.*?\s+(?:install|i|ci)\b"),
-        safe_pattern!("yarn-add", r"yarn\b.*?\s+(?:add|install)\b"),
-        safe_pattern!("pnpm-install", r"pnpm\b.*?\s+(?:add|install|i)\b"),
+        safe_pattern!("npm-install", r"npm\b.*?\s+(?:install|i|ci)(?=\s|$)"),
+        safe_pattern!("yarn-add", r"yarn\b.*?\s+(?:add|install)(?=\s|$)"),
+        safe_pattern!("pnpm-install", r"pnpm\b.*?\s+(?:add|install|i)(?=\s|$)"),
         // list/info commands are safe
-        safe_pattern!("npm-list", r"npm\b.*?\s+(?:list|ls|info|view)\b"),
-        safe_pattern!("yarn-list", r"yarn\b.*?\s+(?:list|info|why)\b"),
+        safe_pattern!("npm-list", r"npm\b.*?\s+(?:list|ls|info|view)(?=\s|$)"),
+        safe_pattern!("yarn-list", r"yarn\b.*?\s+(?:list|info|why)(?=\s|$)"),
         // audit is safe
-        safe_pattern!("npm-audit", r"npm\b.*?\s+audit\b"),
-        safe_pattern!("yarn-audit", r"yarn\b.*?\s+audit\b"),
+        safe_pattern!("npm-audit", r"npm\b.*?\s+audit(?=\s|$)"),
+        safe_pattern!("yarn-audit", r"yarn\b.*?\s+audit(?=\s|$)"),
         // pip list/show are safe
-        safe_pattern!("pip-list", r"pip\b.*?\s+(?:list|show|freeze)\b"),
+        safe_pattern!("pip-list", r"pip\b.*?\s+(?:list|show|freeze)(?=\s|$)"),
         // poetry show/info are safe
-        safe_pattern!("poetry-show", r"poetry\b.*?\s+show\b"),
-        safe_pattern!("poetry-env-list", r"poetry\b.*?\benv\s+list\b"),
+        safe_pattern!("poetry-show", r"poetry\b.*?\s+show(?=\s|$)"),
+        safe_pattern!("poetry-env-list", r"poetry\b.*?\benv\s+list(?=\s|$)"),
         // cargo build/test/check are safe
         safe_pattern!(
             "cargo-safe",
             r"cargo\b.*?\s+(?:build|test|check|clippy|fmt|doc|bench)\b"
         ),
         // apt list/show are safe
-        safe_pattern!("apt-list", r"apt\b.*?\s+(?:list|show|search)\b"),
+        safe_pattern!("apt-list", r"apt\b.*?\s+(?:list|show|search)(?=\s|$)"),
         safe_pattern!("apt-get-list", r"apt-get\b.*?\s+(?:update|upgrade)(?!\s+.*-y)"),
         // dry-run flags
         safe_pattern!("npm-dry-run", r"npm\b.*--dry-run"),
